name: TitleMax Title Loans
description_short: Leon Valley, TX's TitleMax Title Loans at 6898 Bandera Rd offers quick title loans with convenient weekday and Saturday hours.
description_long:
TitleMax Title Loans operates at 6898 Bandera Rd in Leon Valley, TX, providing accessible title loan services to the local community. The standalone storefront is conveniently located and open Monday through Friday from 10 AM to 7 PM, with Saturday hours from 10 AM to 4 PM, making it easy for Leon Valley residents to visit during their preferred times.

At this Leon Valley location, you can apply for title loans and access quick cash solutions when you need funds fast. The team at 6898 Bandera Rd is ready to help with your lending needs. Call +1 210-526-6877 to speak with a representative about rates, loan terms, and what documents you'll need to bring.

If you're a Leon Valley resident needing emergency funds, bring your vehicle title, government ID, and proof of residency to speed up your application process. TitleMax Title Loans provides straightforward title lending designed for borrowers in urgent situations who need access to cash.
pros: Same-day cash available — loan approved and funded in a single visit
Keep driving your vehicle while the title pledge is active
Most credit types accepted — vehicle title compensates for poor credit history
Offers both secured (title pledge) and unsecured line of credit products
Bilingual staff at the Memphis Summer Avenue location
Memphis location operational since February 2007 — established local presence
481+ Google reviews with 5.0/5 average rating indicating strong customer service
cons: APR and fee information not disclosed on website — rates listed only as 'competitive' with no figures
Online unsecured line of credit restricted to residents of 11 states only
Requires a clear vehicle title — borrowers with liens on their vehicle do not qualify
Closed Sundays; limited Saturday hours (9am–4pm) reduce accessibility on weekends
Title pledge puts vehicle ownership at risk if borrower cannot repay
best_for: Vehicle owners with a clear title who need same-day cash and have limited credit options
Borrowers in TitleMax's 11 supported states seeking an unsecured revolving line of credit
Spanish-speaking customers in the Memphis area needing bilingual financial services
Consumers with poor or thin credit who cannot qualify for traditional personal loans
diagnosis: TitleMax is best suited for vehicle owners who hold a clear car title, need emergency cash the same day, and cannot access traditional credit. The primary caveat is full rate opacity — the website discloses no APR or fee data, so borrowers must visit a store to understand the true cost, and title loans as a category carry repossession risk if payments are missed.
services: Car title pledge (lump-sum loan secured by vehicle title)
Flex line of credit (revolving credit secured by vehicle title)
Unsecured flexible line of credit (online, select states only)
Credit check with most credit types accepted
Vehicle value assessment for loan amount determination
Online application for unsecured personal line of credit
meta_description: TitleMax Title Loans at 6898 Bandera Rd, Leon Valley, TX. Quick title loans with fast cash solutions and convenient weekend hours.
